name: Buyer Journey Analysis
description: See every touch that happened on a single account, and get a prioritized next-best-action grounded in how your won deals actually played out.
alsoSurfaces: What does the typical winning journey look like for this segment?
Where is this account vs. the winning pattern?
Which signals predict a stall or a stuck deal?
beforeWeRun: Which account: by name, ID, or top-N-from-list?
Pattern reference: last quarter's wins, all-time wins, or custom?
Channels to include: email, content, events, ad-engagement?

whatYoullGet.name: Journey timeline
whatYoullGet.desc: Chronological view of all touches with channel, persona, and engagement weight.

whatYoullGet.name: Pattern fit
whatYoullGet.desc: How this journey compares to the winning-deal pattern, with gaps flagged.

whatYoullGet.name: Next-best-action
whatYoullGet.desc: Prioritized recommendation grounded in pattern data, not gut.

whatYoullGet.name: Stall risks
whatYoullGet.desc: Specific signals indicating the deal may be at risk.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources
whatYoullGet.desc: Every claim cited to the underlying interaction record.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your journey memo in ~12 min.
